channel.title: Ncku on Advanced Integration Laboratory
channel.description: Recent content in Ncku on Advanced Integration Laboratory

item.title: Dr Lan Invited as Adjudicator for the 9th NCKU Mechanical Project Exhibition
item.description: The Mechanical Project Exhibition returned on 17 June at National Cheng Kung University, with 39 student teams presenting project-based engineering work. The exhibition highlighted the integration of mechanical engineering theory, creativity and collaborative innovation.
